name: kensho
description: Kensho — open-source test report generator (Allure-class). Part of KaizenReport.

scripts.demo: pnpm --filter playwright-demo run seed && pnpm --filter @kaizenreport/kensho run generate --input ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-results --output ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-report && pnpm --filter @kaizenreport/kensho run open --report ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-report

_securityNote: pnpm.overrides force patched versions of vulnerable transitive deps pulled by the example/demo test frameworks (cypress, mocha, appium, newman, vitest). The published packages themselves ship zero third-party runtime deps.
